'''âch-ch-n-sh''' ('''kachachneshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backburn|backburn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backburn|backburn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-ch-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kachachneshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichachneshoko|thichachneshoko]] || [[word:jichachneshoko|jichachneshoko]] || [[word:shichachneshoko|shichachneshoko]] || [[word:kichachneshoko|kichachneshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
